--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Dear Jeffrey,

I am really sorry I could not finally talk to you
last night, but I was
stuck with the Head Fashion Editor of US Harper's
Bazaar and came back home
quite late.

Anyway, we will send you on Monday a Memorandum of
Understanding that we
will write during the weekend.

I wish you a fantastic weekend. Talk to you soon.

With my very best regards,

Gerald
